name: Idea Validator
persona: A Head of Product or founder at a 20–200 person B2B SaaS company making go/no-go calls during roadmap planning without a dedicated research function
problem_statement: Teams green-light product ideas based on narrative and bias without writing down assumptions, making risks invisible until after roadmap time is already spent
artifact_type: single-page web app with live-updating scoring workspace and a persistent verdict side panel
